content.en:
It didn't take long for the galaxy-level powerhouse of the Crystal Spirit Clan to return.

"Everyone, please come with me!"

The galaxy-level powerhouse said respectfully.

"Let's go!"

The Sun Divine Lord said.

Ye Tian followed the Sun Yao Divine Lord to the depths of the Jingling River System, and because Ye Tian's cultivation was relatively weak, the Sun Yao Divine Lord wrapped Ye Tian with his own strength, passing through one galaxy after another at an incredible speed.

After a while, everyone came to the Crystal Spirit Continent.

The Crystal Spirit Continent is the only main continent in the Crystal Spirit River System, and more than fifty percent of the Crystal Spirit people live on it.

When Ye Tian and the others entered the Crystal Spirit Continent, a strong man of the Crystal Spirit Clan with a purple mark on his eyebrows appeared.

"Purple Crystal Spirit Clansman!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Purple Crystal Spirit Clan is the royal family of the Crystal Spirit Clan, and each of them has a spatial talent.

When this Purple Crystal Spirit Clan powerhouse approached, Ye Tian used his copy talent to check his talent.

Crystal Spirit: Mo Gan

Cultivation talent: Yu level

Strength Talents: Arcanon

Speed Talent: God-level

Defense Talent: Arcane

Spatial Talent: Pseudo-Armagined (Eighty)

Marksmanship talent: Sunrise level

......

"Universe-level cultivation talent, the other party's face has some traces of old age, he must be very old, and his strength should have reached the level of a cosmic god. It's a pity that his spatial talent is not even at the level of the Arcane. "

Ye Tian was a little disappointed.

"It turned out to be the Sun Yao God Lord of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race!"

The Purple Crystal Spirit Clan Cosmic God walked over and spoke.

"Heavenly Stem Divine Lord, long time no see!"

The Sun Yao Divine Lord said very calmly.

Although the two knew each other, they were obviously not friends.

"This is His Royal Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race!"

The Heavenly Stem Divine Lord looked at Ye Tian.

"Hello Heavenly Stem Divine Lord, I am His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race!"

Ye Tian introduced himself.

"Tiangan Divine Lord, you should know what we are here this time, right?"

"Of course I know!" The Heavenly Stem Divine Lord's eyes seemed to be a little displeased, but his face was full of smiles, and he said, "The third elder is already waiting for the two, please come with me!"

"Lead the way!"

The Sun Divine Lord said.

The group followed the Heavenly Stem Divine Lord into a huge city of the Crystal Spirit Clan, Heavenly Blessing City.

Tianyou City is not the core area of the real headquarters of the Crystal Spirit Clan, although Ye Tian and the Sun Yao Divine Lord are Terrans, even if they are Terrans, they cannot enter the core area of the Crystal Spirit Clan.

Each race has its own secrets, and it would be devastating for a race to let them into their core area.

It's like the supreme temple of the human race, even if it comes to itself, it is extremely strict to check to prevent outsiders from mixing in.

Although the Crystal Spirit Clan has taken refuge in the Terrans, it still maintains autonomous management, and the core area of the Crystal Spirit Clan is also strictly protected, so that no one can casually snoop on the core secrets of the Crystal Spirit Clan.

If the Terrans want to forcibly enter the core area of the Crystal Spirit Clan, it is tantamount to being an enemy of the Crystal Spirit Clan.

Naturally, the Crystal Spirit Clan will not give up!

Therefore, this time, the Sun Yao Divine Lord brought Ye Tian to the Crystal Spirit Clan, and they only arranged for them to enter Heavenly Blessing City.

Entering Heavenly Bless City, they entered a palace.

Here, Ye Tian and the Sun Yao Divine Lord met with the three elders of the Crystal Spirit Clan.

"Meet God Bless God!"

When the Sun Yao Divine Lord saw the third elder of the Crystal Spirit Clan, he was very respectful.

"The Sun Yao God Lord is polite!"

The Heavenly Bless Divine Lord nodded slightly.

Ye Tian looked deeply at this Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord, the other party had white hair, a dry face, and a strong dead aura on his body.

"The end of life is coming!"

Ye Tian presented this word in his mind.

Judging from the other party's face and vitality, there is definitely not much life left.

However, even so, Ye Tianke did not dare to underestimate the other party.

The Sun Dawn God Lord is the cosmic god of the supreme hall of the human race, and the human race is the lord of the crystal spirit race, a master-like existence.

However, the Sun Blessing Divine Lord still respects the Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord very much, which is enough to prove that the strength of the Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord is definitely far beyond the strength of the Sun Yao Divine Lord.

Ye Tian was not very far away from this Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord, so the copying talent could easily cover the other party.

"Check!"

Under the shroud of copying talents, the opponent's talent situation can be seen at a glance.

Seeing this, Ye Tian was very surprised.

Crystal Spirit Clan: Yun Tianyou

Cultivation talent: Yu level

Strength Talent: God

Defense Talent: God

Speed Talent: God-level

Knife Talent: No superior

Spatial Talent: Armagind

Golden Shield Talent: God-level

Gravity Talent: God

......

"What a powerful talent!"

Ye Tian was extremely shocked in his heart.

How powerful such a talent is, such as the mystery-level spatial talent, with the background of the crystal spirit clan, the Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord has definitely cultivated the spatial supernatural power.

"God Bless God is a cosmic god who has been achieved by a son of the universe!"

Ye Tian guessed.

If this is the case, the strength of the Heavenly God Lord is absolutely terrifying, he may have cultivated to the extreme of the Cosmic God, and it is no wonder that the Sun Yao God Lord respects the other party so much.

It is estimated that this God Blessed Divine Lord is also famous in the universe, which is extraordinary.

"Meet God Bless God!"

Ye Tian hugged his fists and greeted.

"You are His Highness Wanfa, the Eternal Ancient Level of the Human Race, although your Human Race is naturally weak, your potential is really unlimited!"

The Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord looked at Ye Tian deeply and exclaimed.

Immediately, he said: "Your purpose, I know, the Space Origin Divine Artifact can give His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws a month to comprehend, but you have to wait for some days, because the Space Origin Divine Object is in the secret world of our Crystal Spirit Clan, and the secret world still has half a year to open! As for letting one of the spatial talents of my clan guide His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws, I can only say as much as possible." You probably want to raise your mystery-level spatial talent to god-level, which is very difficult. Even if I didn't do it at the beginning, it takes not only luck, but also chance, in short, it's too hard. In this way, you can enter a treasure trove of classics in Heavenly Blessing City and flip through some classics on spatial cultivation, and you may have some insights. After that, I will arrange for a top Armaged-level spatial talent to guide you personally, and it is up to you whether it can help you or not!"

"Thank you, God bless the Divine Lord!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

"Sun Yao Divine Lord, His Highness Wanfa, I'll let someone arrange for you to stay first, and then let someone take you to the treasure house of classics tomorrow, how about it?"

God God asked.

"Just follow the arrangement of the God Blessed God!"

Ye Tian nodded.

After all, this is someone's territory, and even the Sun Yao God Lord doesn't dare to say much, so he can naturally only listen to other people's arrangements.

Subsequently.

The Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord arranged for Ye Tian and the Sun Yao Divine Lord to enter an attic in Heavenly Blessing City to live.

Somewhere in the attic.

Ye Tian had a private chat with the Sun Yao Divine Lord alone.

"Your Highness Wanfa, now it seems that they are really very perfunctory!"

The Sun Yao God Lord said in a deep voice.

"Why do you say that?" Ye Tian asked.

The Sun Yao God Lord explained: "Tianyou City is just a city built by the God God Lord himself, the heritage of this city is not good, how many precious classics can the treasure house of Tianyou City's classics? Moreover, let you go to the classics tomorrow, it is estimated that people will take out the most precious and core classics today, and only show you some irrelevant classics, this is not perfunctory or anything? But I have thought too much about it, most of these vassal races are relatively vassal, and they only want the big race of the human race as an umbrella, but they are not completely of the same mind as our human race. "

"So that's the case!" Ye Tian nodded, agreeing with the Sun Yao Divine Lord's words, and immediately asked curiously: "Sun Yao Divine Lord, is that Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord very powerful?"

The Sun Yao Divine Lord showed a deep look of jealousy, and nodded: "Yes, that Heavenly Blessing Divine Lord once hit His Highness the Peak-level Son of the Universe when he was at the emperor level, but the background of the Crystal Spirit Clan was not good, and later he fell to the ordinary level His Highness when he was at the great god level. However, he has now reached the peak of the Cosmic God, and his strength is much stronger than mine, and it only takes one move to kill me. Once on a cosmic god battlefield, he alone once killed eight peak-level cosmic gods. "

"It's really strong!"

Ye Tian sighed.

"However, if Your Highness Wanfa is promoted to the Universe God in the future, a strong person like the Heavenly Blessing God Lord is nothing. The Sun Divine Lord said.

"Sun Yao Divine Lord, I'll go outside for a walk, it should be fine, right?"

Ye Tian said suddenly.

"It's okay, you are the Eternal Ancient Highness of our human race, and the Crystal Spirit Clan will not dare to let you have an accident in Tianyou City!"

The words of the Sun Yao Divine Lord reassured Ye Tian.

Ye Tian walked out of the attic and came to the street.

The purpose of his coming out was not to distract himself, but to check the talents of other Crystal Spirit Clansmen to see if he could encounter god-level spatial talents.

But I think about it, this idea is a bit too much.

After walking around, except for some crystal spirit clans in the building shrouded by powerful law formations, he used the copy talent to check the other crystal spirit clans, but none of them encountered god-level space talents.

So, Ye Tian returned to the attic.

Day 2.

The Crystal Spirit Clan sent a great god-level to take Ye Tian to the treasure house of Heavenly Blessing City's classics.
